archetype: Archetype 2 (Performance Pro) mixed with Archetype 7 (Electric & Neon)
design_philosophy: Tactical Minimalism meets Electric Neon. The platform should feel like an immersive, high-performance racing command center or F1 steering wheel dashboard. Dark backgrounds (obsidian/carbon) with sharp, vibrant neon accents to highlight critical data like braking points, telemetry, and track limits.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Control Room Grid. Density and precision are key for telemetry and data panels. Use wide spacing for marketing pages and tight padding for dashboards.

buttons.primary: bg-brand-primary text-black font-bold uppercase tracking-wider hover:bg-brand-primary-hover transition-colors shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(0,255,102,0.3)] hover:shadow-[0_0_25px_rgba(0,255,102,0.6)]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white hover:border-white hover:bg-white/5 transition-all uppercase tracking-wider

inputs.base: bg-background-tertiary border-white/10 text-white focus:border-brand-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-brand-primary transition-all font-mono

navigation.header: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-background-primary/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10
navigation.links: text-sm uppercase tracking-[0.1em] font-bold text-foreground-secondary hover:text-white transition-colors

hero_bg.description: Blurred motion F1 racing car on track (dark overlay recommended)
hero_bg.usage: Hero section background with dark overlay for landing page

f1_car.usage: F1 category showcase or fallback image when 3D model is loading

telemetry_dashboard.description: Steering wheel dashboard in dark lighting

track_abstract.usage: Background texture for Trajectory Simulator or Track Guide sections

motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Fade in with slight upward translation (framer-motion).
motion_and_interactions.hover_effects: 1px borders light up in neon colors; subtle glow drop-shadows on cards.
motion_and_interactions.3d_interactions: When clicking a car card, trigger a framer-motion layout expansion, load the Three.js canvas in the center, and rotate the model 360 degrees slowly. Use @react-three/drei's PresentationControls.

libraries_and_tools.icons: lucide-react for UI icons, raw SVG for track maps
libraries_and_tools.charts: recharts (Customized with neon colors, pure black backgrounds, straight lines instead of curves for a tactical feel)
libraries_and_tools.3d: @react-three/fiber, @react-three/drei (Use <Environment preset='night'> and neon point lights for rendering cars)

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup Tailwind config with the specified neon colors and sharp border radii.
2. Use Bebas Neue for all main section headers and JetBrains Mono for data points/telemetry numbers.
3. Build a hero section with 'hero_bg' overlaid with bg-black/70 and a stark, highly contrasted CTA.
4. For Track Guides, implement a bento grid showing an SVG track map, telemetry chart (Recharts), and braking point data list.

5. For the 3D Car Viewer, use @react-three/fiber. Since real car models might not be locally available, render a placeholder low-poly sports car geometry or use realistic Box geometries with neon wireframes if a GLTF is missing, and label them properly.
6. Subscription page should use the 'Tracing Beam' or glowing border concept for the Premium tier.
7. Every interactive element must have a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='f1-select-btn').
